result.output_text:
1. Files changed

- [python/helaicopter_api/server/openapi_artifacts.py](/Users/tony/Code/helaicopter/.oats-worktrees/run-platform-api-and-orchestration-refresh/swagger-ui-gateway/python/helaicopter_api/server/openapi_artifacts.py#L24) now generates stable filtered specs for the frontend app API, OATS orchestration, and the Prefect proxy surface alongside the full backend spec.
- [src/app/schema/page.tsx](/Users/tony/Code/helaicopter/.oats-worktrees/run-platform-api-and-orchestration-refresh/swagger-ui-gateway/src/app/schema/page.tsx#L38) is now a single “Unified API Explorer” entry point with clear surface labels, raw spec links, and endpoint inspection.
- [src/components/layout/app-sidebar.tsx](/Users/tony/Code/helaicopter/.oats-worktrees/run-platform-api-and-orchestration-refresh/swagger-ui-gateway/src/components/layout/app-sidebar.tsx#L27) renames the nav entry to `API Explorer`.
- [README.md](/Users/tony/Code/helaicopter/.oats-worktrees/run-platform-api-and-orchestration-refresh/swagger-ui-gateway/README.md#L91) documents the unified explorer and the stable/proxied spec artifacts.
- [tests/test_api_bootstrap.py](/Users/tony/Code/helaicopter/.oats-worktrees/run-platform-api-and-orchestration-refresh/swagger-ui-gateway/tests/test_api_bootstrap.py#L170) now covers generated surface artifacts and explorer/navigation documentation.
- Added generated artifacts:
  - [public/openapi/helaicopter-frontend-app-api.json](/Users/tony/Code/helaicopter/.oats-worktrees/run-platform-api-and-orchestration-refresh/swagger-ui-gateway/public/openapi/helaicopter-frontend-app-api.json)
  - [public/openapi/helaicopter-oats-orchestration-api.json](/Users/tony/Code/helaicopter/.oats-worktrees/run-platform-api-and-orchestration-refresh/swagger-ui-gateway/public/openapi/helaicopter-oats-orchestration-api.json)
  - [public/openapi/helaicopter-prefect-orchestration-api.json](/Users/tony/Code/helaicopter/.oats-worktrees/run-platform-api-and-orchestration-refresh/swagger-ui-gateway/public/openapi/helaicopter-prefect-orchestration-api.json)

2. Validation commands run and outcomes

- `PYTHONPATH=python /Users/tony/Code/helaicopter/.venv/bin/pytest -q tests/test_api_bootstrap.py tests/test_api_orchestration.py tests/test_api_prefect_orchestration.py`
  Result: passed, `25 passed in 1.08s`
- `env npm_config_cache=.cache/npm npm run lint`
  Result: passed

3. Remaining risks or follow-ups

- The explorer is a repo-local API explorer, not an embedded third-party Swagger UI package. It satisfies the acceptance criteria, but if you want “Try it out” request execution next, that would be a separate UI addition.
- `npm run api:openapi` hit a sandbox/`uv` issue in this environment, so I regenerated artifacts with the underlying script directly via the project Python env. The committed outputs are current, but the `uv` execution path itself was not fixed in this task.
